StepAction: Idle: runloop iteration entry; observed condition derived; compaction commit decision pending
tryNarrative loads previous anchor message; computes prevBody = textPartsJoined(anchor.parts); parses prevLastRound from `## Round N` markers in prevBody
Identify unanswered user msg id (Spec 1 synergy): walk tail backward, find most-recent user msg whose nearest assistant child has finish ∉ {stop, tool-calls, length}

serializeRedactedDialog walks tail messages (excluding unanswered user msg); per round emits ## Round N header; per role emits **User**/**Reasoning**/**Assistant**/**Tool** markers; tool outputs replaced with recall_id: part.id references
Build anchor[n+1].body = prevBody + '\n\n' + tailText; compactWithSharedContext writes anchor message with this body as text part; publishCompactedAndResetChain with {observed, kind: 'narrative'}
scheduleHybridEnrichment estimates anchor body tokens (chars/4); compares against floor (5K) and ceiling (50K)
Skip recompress: anchor too small to warrant LLM cost. Telemetry: recompress.skip = below-floor
Defer recompress: anchor in steady-state band; will fire on next extend if it grows past ceiling. No-op this cycle
Recompress required: dispatch by provider. Acquire hybridEnrichInFlight lock (per-session). Stale-anchor check: confirm anchor still latest (no interloper)

Codex path: invoke /responses/compact via tryLowCostServer-style call with anchor body as conversationItem. On success, in-place update anchor's text part. On 429/timeout, leave anchor body as-is (next extend will retry trigger)

Non-codex path: invoke Hybrid.runHybridLlm with priorAnchor as input; STEP 3 in-place update overwrites narrative-extended body with LLM summary. Staleness check on completion (interloper anchor → leave stub as new active)
Release hybridEnrichInFlight lock; emit telemetry compaction.recompressed with {provider, kind, inputTokens, outputTokens, latencyMs, result}

Next runloop iter render path: filterCompacted slices at anchor[n+1]; transformPostAnchorTail v7 walks remaining messages, replacing each completed/error tool part's state.output with `[recall_id: <part.id>]` placeholder. In-flight and compaction-bearing assistants exempt

LLM call fires with: [anchor body containing redacted-dialog history] + [post-anchor stream with tool payloads redacted] + [Spec 1 replayed unanswered user msg if present]. Model has full prior context + current question
Recall: working-cache.deriveLedger walks Session.messages, finds part with id == requested part_id; returns state.output from storage (source of truth retained even after anchor body redaction)
